patch.value: changelog --format json emits TOON on stdout without global --json

pm-extension 'changelog generate --format json' and 'changelog export --format json' returned a structured object rendered as TOON on stdout; valid JSON required global --json. Fix: renderedCommandResult marker + toon/json renderer overrides so json-mode prints verbatim JSON; non-json returns fall through unchanged; default md byte-identical.
generate/export --format json emit valid JSON on stdout without --json; default md byte-identical; no new test failures.

value.author: claude-opus
value.text: Fixed via renderedCommandResult marker + toon/json renderer overrides (renderers capability). Verified: generate/export --format json emit valid JSON on stdout without --json; default md byte-identical; 139 tests pass (2 pre-existing --isolated CLI-version failures unrelated).

patch.value: Added renderedCommandResult marker + toon/json renderer overrides (renderers capability); wrapped generate/export json-mode returns.
changelog generate/export --format json emit valid JSON on stdout without global --json
Verified: both emit valid JSON on stdout; default md byte-identical; 139 tests pass (2 pre-existing --isolated CLI-version failures unrelated)
